successCriteria.description: src/modules/auth/user.entity.ts exists and exports User interface matching the users table schema
src/modules/auth/user.repository.ts exists and exports UserRepository class with findByUsername method
src/modules/auth/auth.dto.ts exists and exports LoginRequest, LoginResponse interfaces and a Fastify-compatible loginSchema for input validation
src/modules/auth/auth.service.ts exists and exports IAuthService interface and AuthService class implementing login
src/modules/auth/auth.middleware.ts exists and exports authenticateJWT and requireRole preHandler hooks
src/modules/auth/auth.controller.ts exists and exports a Fastify plugin that registers POST /auth/login and POST /auth/logout, and decorates request with user
src/modules/auth/index.ts exists and re-exports the auth plugin
tests/unit/modules/auth/auth.service.test.ts exists and contains Jest tests for AuthService.login with valid and invalid credentials
POST /auth/login with valid credentials returns 200 and a JWT token
POST /auth/login with missing username or password returns 400 due to Fastify schema validation
A protected route using authenticateJWT returns 401 when no Authorization header is present
A protected route using requireRole('manager') returns 403 when user role is 'employee'
All async errors in AuthService.login and middleware are caught and return appropriate HTTP error responses (401 for invalid credentials, 500 for unexpected errors)
AuthService.login does not log password or passwordHash (GP-004 compliance)
The auth plugin can be registered on a Fastify instance with pool and jwtSecret options

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Phase 4 — Employee View – Leave Application Form
